title: Vietnamese Sirloin Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry dish made with sirloin, vegetables, and a hint of Vietnamese spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of buttery in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sirloin and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Remove the sirloin from the skillet and set aside to rest.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of buttery, stir, and vietnamese.
Add the bell peppers, onions, and garlic to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp.
Return the sirloin to the skillet and stir in the steak seasoning.
Serve the sirloin over cooked rice and garnish with chopped green onions.
Optional: serve with additional stir-fry sauce on the side.
